args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS average_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE date BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY average_rating DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS average_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review WHERE date BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY average_rating DESC LIMIT 1;

result.preview: [{"name": "Coffee House Too Cafe", "description": "Located at 501 Fairmount Ave in Philadelphia, PA, this inviting establishment offers a delightful menu featuring Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes, perfect for a cozy meal any time of the day."}]

"The business with the highest average rating between January 1, 2016 and June 30, 2016, with at least 5 reviews, is \"Coffee House Too Cafe\" with an average rating of 4.0. It belongs to the categories: Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes."
